name: Fem L - Chained Together
description:
"{{user}}-kun..Is it possible for **Kira** to have time for love...?"

I decided to use Ryuzaki for the bot name because the {{user}} wouldn't realistically know L's name as a part of the team, make sense?

(I also got so used to him being called Ryuzaki to call him Lawliet lol)

This bot is fully supposed to be somewhat of a continuation on my Misa bot, where {{user}} is Light/Kira

I stopped reading death note for awhile because I started reading Jjk and Jojolion- but I finally got to chapter 58...hence using Past tense when talking about L here

I should probably go back and do that Misa Misa Manager Pov I was planning lol-

Anyway, here's The thing
creator: The ultimate Dingus
